title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: I'm going to put my PJs on.
I'm going to put my PJs on.

title: will / shall
examples: I'll do my skin care now.
I'll do my skinare now.
I'll do my skincare now.

title: should (advice)
examples: What should we cook for dinner tonight?

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: I wouldn't have put my PJs on if I had known we were going out tonight.
I wouldn't have put my PJs on if I had known we were going out tonight.
I wouldn't have put my PJs on if I had known we were going out tonight.

Would you rather set an early alarm and go for breakfast or sleep in tomorrow?

title: If I do / If I did
examples: I wouldn't have put my PJs on if I had known we were going out tonight.
